title: Astitva
desc: Dr Simran, a renowned gynaecologist, marries Abhi, who is 10 years younger than her. However, her family disapproves of the match. S01 E144.

title: TV Ke Uss Paar
desc: Vivek is a dedicated MNC employee, but at home, his mother is consumed by television's daily soaps. Her love for these shows doesn't just entertain her, it transports her into their fictional. S01 E133.
